narrative:
Newark 6-D (precinct in Licking County) has 884 registered voters, with 66.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.7%, a modest Republican lean of 4.4 percentage points.
